name: CATABAS.PHARM.INC. NEW
summary: Catabasis Pharmaceuticals Inc. is a biopharmaceutical company focused on the discovery, development and commercialization of novel therapeutics for serious diseases. The company is focused on edasalonexent, an investigational oral drug for the treatment of Duchenne muscular dystrophy (DMD). Catabasis Pharmaceuticals Inc. is based in Cambridge, Massachusetts.
